# 3.2.3.4 Process Scheduling and Guidance Management — Frontend Requirements

**Source:** Section 3.2.3.4  
**Purpose:** Generate operation scheduling templates from routing for MES benchmarks; provide workshop technical guidance via Pad terminals.

---

## Screens

### 1. Scheduling templates list (`/pdm/scheduling`)

**Auto-generated templates** from approved routings.

| Column | |
|--------|--|
| Product / style | |
| Routing version | |
| Total scheduled hours | Tabular nums |
| Operation count | |
| Template status | Generated / Customized |
| Last generated | |

**Action:** `Regenerate` (mock) — recalculates from latest approved routing.

**Filters:** product, status.

---

### 2. Scheduling template detail (`/pdm/scheduling/:id`)

**Read-only Gantt-style or table timeline** (MVP: table).

| Seq | Operation | Std hours | Cumulative hours | Scheduled slot offset |
|-----|-----------|-----------|------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Cutting | 15 | 15 | T+0 |
| 2 | Sewing | 45 | 60 | T+15 |
| 3 | Inspection | 10 | 70 | T+60 |

- **Cumulative hours** auto-calculated from routing sequence and standard hours.
- Optional manual adjustment column (override) with justification — flags row as `Customized`.

**Export:** PDF schedule template (mock download) for production planning reference.

**Banner:** "Template auto-generated from Routing v{n} — used as MES scheduling benchmark."

---

### 3. Workshop guidance — Pad view (`/pdm/guidance/pad`)

**Mobile-first layout** (design at 360px).

#### Entry methods

| Method | UI |
|--------|-----|
| Scan work order | Barcode input field (mock scan button) |
| Scan product barcode | Same |
| Manual search | Style number combobox |

#### Guidance display (after lookup)

**Header:** work order #, style number, operation name.

**Content sections:**

1. **SOP** — PDF link + open in new tab / inline viewer
2. **Process parameters** — definition list
3. **Inspection standards** — checklist (read-only)
4. **Operational video** — embedded player if available

**Navigation:** if multiple operations in routing, swipe or tab between operations.

---

### 4. Document view history log (`/pdm/guidance/history`)

**Admin audit table** (mocked):

| Timestamp | Operator | Work order | Operation | Document viewed | Shift |
|-----------|----------|------------|-----------|-----------------|-------|
| 2026-06-14 08:02 | Ali | WO-1001 | Sewing | SOP v2 | Morning |

**Filters:** operator, date range, operation.

**Purpose UI copy:** "Ensures operators verified latest process requirements before shift start."

#### Pad acknowledgment flow

Before showing guidance content, optional **acknowledgment screen**:

- Checkbox: "I have reviewed the process requirements for this operation."
- `Begin work` button logs view event (mock POST) then shows content.

---

## Mock Data Shape

```ts
interface SchedulingTemplateDto {
  Id: string
  ProductId: string
  StyleNumber: string
  RoutingVersion: number
  TotalHoursMinutes: number
  Status: 'generated' | 'customized'
  GeneratedDatetime: string
  Operations: SchedulingOperationDto[]
}

interface SchedulingOperationDto {
  Sequence: number
  OperationId: string
  OperationName: string
  StandardHoursMinutes: number
  CumulativeMinutes: number
  ScheduledOffsetMinutes: number
  IsCustomized: boolean
  OverrideJustification: string | null
}

interface GuidanceLookupDto {
  WorkOrderNumber: string
  StyleNumber: string
  ProductName: string
  CurrentOperation: {
    OperationId: string
    OperationName: string
    Sop: AttachmentDto | null
    Video: { Url: string } | null
    Parameters: { Name: string; Value: string; Unit: string }[]
    InspectionStandards: { Item: string; Criteria: string }[]
  }
  AllOperations: { Sequence: number; Name: string }[]
}

interface GuidanceViewLogDto {
  Id: string
  OperatorName: string
  WorkOrderNumber: string
  OperationName: string
  DocumentName: string
  ViewedDatetime: string
  Shift: string
  Acknowledged: boolean
}
```

Mocks: `src/mocks/pdm/scheduling.ts`, `src/mocks/pdm/guidance.ts`.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Scheduling templates auto-list from approved routings with cumulative hours
- [ ] Template detail shows operation sequence timeline with optional overrides
- [ ] Pad guidance view works at 360px with scan/search entry
- [ ] SOP, parameters, video, and inspection standards display per operation
- [ ] View history log renders with filters
- [ ] Acknowledgment flow logs mock view event before content display
- [ ] Four async states on all views
